meta_title: For Freelancers: freelance pitching to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: How to Solve 'Can't Finish Projects'
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on freelance work. Learn advanced pitching strategies using Antigravity and Claude Code to finish projects faster and impress high-value clients.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is often scope creep and poor validation. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you can automate the architecture phase. This combination allows you to validate client requirements through high-fidelity prototypes, ensuring you ship faster and get paid sooner.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the architecture is sound, the client is excited, but the momentum hits a wall. You’re stuck in the '90% done' trap, where the final polish feels like an endless slog. This isn't a failure of skill; it's a failure of workflow. When you can't finish projects, your reputation as a freelancer bleeds out one deadline at a time.

It is time to pivot from manual coding to AI-augmented engineering. By treating your freelance pitching process as a high-velocity product launch, you can eliminate friction before it starts. We’re going to use Antigravity to structure your intent and Claude Code to execute the build, turning your development process into a repeatable, high-output machine.

steps.title: Define the MVP Scope
steps.description: Before writing code, use AI to constrain the scope. This prevents the 'feature creep' that kills project completion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following client requirements and generate a minimalist MVP feature set that delivers 80% of the value with 20% of the effort. Focus on core user flows.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review this requirements doc and output a JSON list of strictly necessary features for a 2-week sprint.'

steps.title: Architect the Boilerplate
steps.description: Use Antigravity to spin up a production-ready folder structure so you aren't wasting time on config.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modern SaaS boilerplate structure using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Include authentication, database schema, and a clean project structure.

steps.title: Automate Database Schema
steps.description: Avoid manual SQL migrations. Let the AI define your schema based on the MVP scope.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Supabase SQL migration script for the user, project, and payment tables defined in our MVP scope. Ensure row-level security is configured.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit schema.sql 'Apply the generated RLS policies and table constraints.'

steps.title: Iterative Feature Implementation
steps.description: Build the core functionality by giving Claude Code small, specific tasks to prevent hallucination and bloat.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Break down the core dashboard component into three logical UI sub-components. Provide the implementation for each.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the user dashboard component based on the provided design wireframe.'

steps.title: Final Quality Assurance
steps.description: Use AI to audit your code for performance bottlenecks and security vulnerabilities before the client handover.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a senior-level code review on the final project. Identify any technical debt or security risks in the authentication flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Audit the entire codebase for common security vulnerabilities and performance issues. Output a fix list.'

pro_tips: Always force the AI to output documentation alongside code; it saves hours of client explanation.
Use Claude Code in 'batch mode' for repetitive tasks like unit testing to maintain high coverage with zero manual effort.
Never accept the first iteration; always ask the AI to 'critique its own output for efficiency' before applying changes.
Sync your Antigravity prompts with a local 'style guide' file so the AI maintains your specific coding standards.
Use CLI aliases to trigger your most common Claude Code prompts, turning a 30-second task into a 2-second command.
content.next_steps: After completing your first project, audit your workflow to identify which steps took the longest, then create custom Antigravity templates to automate those specific bottlenecks.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting incomplete projects define your freelance career. Build faster, ship cleaner, and command higher rates by mastering the AI-augmented workflow. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
